title: Meta's pro-AI ad campaign is conspicuously light on AI - Engadget
summary: As we enter this next wave of AI, we're continuing that work and doing everything we can to ensure the future is for everyone." Meta might believe the future is "for everyone," but Moreno apparently felt differently about the present.
